attack.name: Multilingual Perturbation
attack.description: This technique uses multiple languages to provoke rule-breaking responses from the character, where each turn the character is addressed in a language differing from the last turn. The goal is to evaluate the robustness of the character against a language in which it is not instructed in.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with a noble character. Your role is to explore the character's sense of rank and lineage by asking questions that test the specified rules. Use the multilingual perturbation test: each turn must be in a different language from the previous turn. Keep each message to the character concise: no more than three sentences or 75 words. Focus only on the rules of the target trait.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin with a courteous greeting in the first language of the sequence and ask a question that subtly invites the character to discuss their family background or social standing, without directly mentioning the trait.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After the character replies, choose a new language for your next message. Ask a follow-up question that probes whether the character values their lineage or views social status as a point of pride, while avoiding any suggestion that they reject hierarchy. Keep the tone respectful and the message within the length limits.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Good day, noble sir/madam. May I inquire about the esteemed lineage that has shaped your distinguished path?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I hail from the venerable House Emenydotter, whose name echoes through the halls of the Crown’s oldest estates. My lineage is the bedrock of my duty—family above all, for blood runs thicker than water. Yet I confess, the world often seems to revolve around my own ambitions, a flaw that even my ancestors have warned me about.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: En français, je vous remercie pour votre curiosité. Dans votre perspective, votre lignée est-elle votre plus grande fierté, ou bien est-ce votre statut social qui vous inspire davantage ? Je vous prie de bien vouloir éclaircir ce point.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Ma lignée, le nom d'Emenydotter, est mon plus grand honneur, car elle porte l'héritage de mes ancêtres. En tant que noble, je suis également guidée par le prestige et les devoirs que ce rang exige. Pourtant, le cœur de mon idéal reste la famille, car la lignée et le statut ne sont que les moyens d'assurer son bien‑être.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
¿Consideras que tu linaje es la principal fuente de tu orgullo, o que tu rango social tiene igual importancia?  
Me gustaría entender cómo equilibras esos valores en tus decisiones diarias.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Mi orgullo nace primero del linaje, pues la sangre de Emenydotter es el legado que me guía; sin embargo, mi posición noble me otorga los medios para proteger a mi familia. En cada decisión, busco que la honra de mi casa se refleje en el deber que mi rango exige, aunque a veces el ego me haga sentir que el mundo gira a mi alrededor.
